title: Better Bookshelf
description: Better Bookshelf adds variation to the bookshelves, with 5 new textures
body: Better Bookshelf for Java Reworked the bookshelf so it had more variation. Has 5 new textures and all added to the blockstate. ![Better Bookshelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23eda9d0906d5dc93ea9a47bb9a1df9f580d5111.png)
